hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer | Tech Lead

about.label: 01 — ABOUT
about.title: Engineering production systems that
about.p1: Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience building enterprise-grade systems. Specialized in Frontend Engineering and Full-Stack Development, delivering production-ready applications for businesses across Angola, Europe, and Brazil.
about.p2: As a Tech Lead, I've architected and shipped complex systems including ERP, CRM, POS, hotel management, and education platforms. My expertise in C#/.NET and React/Next.js enables me to build complete solutions end-to-end.
about.p3: Passionate about AI Integration, bringing intelligent features to production systems through LLM integration, prompt engineering, and AI-powered automation.
about.p4: Bachelor's in Computer Science from ISPM Angola. Currently studying Systems Analysis & Development at AIEC (Brazil - Online). Based in Luanda, Angola — available for international remote work.
about.bachelorSchool: Instituto Superior Politécnico Metropolitano de Angola (2023 - 2028)

expertise.label: 02 — EXPERTISE
expertise.title: Core Competencies
expertise.subtitle: From concept to deployment — delivering production-ready systems that scale internationally.
expertise.frontendDesc: Building high-performance, accessible web applications with modern frameworks. Crafting responsive UIs that deliver exceptional user experiences across all devices.
expertise.fullstackDesc: End-to-end product development from architecture to final delivery. Building robust APIs, managing complex databases, and delivering production-ready applications.
expertise.aiDesc: Integrating AI into production systems. Building intelligent applications with LLM integration, process automation, and AI-powered features to optimize operations.
expertise.systemDesc: Designing scalable and robust systems from database schema to cloud deployment. Ensuring security, performance, and reliability in production environments.
expertise.analysisDesc: Translating complex business requirements into precise technical solutions. Creating professional enterprise reports with DevExpress and XtraReports for data-driven decisions.
expertise.enterpriseDesc: Delivering ERP, CRM, POS, and invoicing systems for businesses. Managing complex databases and building solutions that handle real enterprise workloads.
expertise.skills: Skills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Blazor, Tailwind CSS, Chakra UI
